productDisplayName: Fabindia Men Rust Tussar Silk Kurta
description: Composition Rust tussar silk kurta, has a mandarin collar, half buttoned placket, pin-tucks from the shoulder to the hem, three quarter sleeves and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only fabindia specialises in natural, craft-based contemporary pieces, while also providing rural craft persons a platform to use traditional dyeing and fabric printing techniques. Capturing the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this kurta for men sets the tone for an all-new ethnic trend. Wear this with denims or cotton pants. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
